reference: I have had a pulsing or throbbing sensation in the back of the neck area for about six years. It is at its worst when I wake up in the morning. I have seen heart, neurologist, and other types of doctors, and have undergone all kinds of tests - heart, blood vessels, brain, and various types of X-rays. So far, no doctor has been able to find out what is wrong with me. Can you help?
text: I've had a pulsing or throbbing sensation in the back of the neck area for about 6 years. It is at its worst when I wake up in the morning. I have seen heart, neurologists, and other types of doctors, and have undergone all kinds of tests: heart, blood vessels, brain, and various types of X-rays. So far, no doctor has been able to find out what is wrong with me, and you all.
